what_it_does: Declares a planned desktop surface specification for view B8 in area B, mapping it to the RHM-react representation and documenting where it should be built, linted, and token-sourced, while flagging that no registered ui:// address currently joins it by feature-id.
observations: It is a generated surface-spec with id B8 and title 'watch-and-react ambient comment'
Status is planned and home_journey is '_unrouted'
Represents only 'RHM-react' and targets the desktop platform
journeys, cross_journeys, addresses, and build_to.components are all empty
build_to references a design lint command and a tokens-to-CSS pipeline
address_gap explicitly notes no registered ui:// address joins by feature-id
standouts: Empty journeys/addresses despite being a surface-spec meant to carry web refs
Explicit address_gap stating the missing ui:// join
Title 'watch-and-react ambient comment' suggests a reactive/ambient UI surface
conventions: Follows a structured surface-spec schema with id, area, title, platforms, represents, status, home_journey, journeys, cross_journeys, addresses, and build_to
Uses directory path as journey spine
Build instructions point to a lint gate and a single token source
Breaks completeness convention by leaving relationship arrays empty and documenting the gap
concerns: All address and journey arrays are empty, so the spec does not yet route to any concrete UI address
address_gap indicates an unresolved registration/mapping issue
Status 'planned' with no components suggests it is a stub awaiting implementation
notes: A planned desktop surface spec for an ambient comment view that currently has no routed addresses and explicitly flags that missing join.
questions: What feature-id should join B8 to a ui:// address?
Which exact RHM-react component or route will implement 'watch-and-react ambient comment'?
What is the intended difference between journeys and cross_journeys in this context?
purpose_vs_actual: Stated purpose is to be a generated surface-spec carrying address-refs; actual content is mostly empty arrays with a documented gap, so it is a placeholder rather than a completed routing spec.
intention_signals: Establish a placeholder surface record for a desktop RHM-react view so that, once a ui:// address is registered by feature-id, the design spec can be wired to the implementation, linted, and styled from the central token source.
novelty: The 'watch-and-react ambient comment' title frames the surface as ambient/reactive rather than a primary page, and the file self-documents its own missing address join via address_gap.
contribution: A structured, self-describing surface placeholder that records intended platform, representation, build hooks, and an explicit gap for the missing ui:// address join.
summary_for_embedding: B8.json is a planned desktop surface specification for the 'watch-and-react ambient comment' RHM-react view, currently unrouted with empty journey/address arrays and an explicit address_gap noting the missing ui:// registration.
intention_for_embedding: This file intends to reserve a design-to-code surface slot for an ambient comment view and document where it should lint, source tokens, and eventually join a registered ui:// address by feature-id.
